name: Smoke Test Council
description: Internal — used by the post-deploy smoke test to verify the deliberation loop works end-to-end with the real LLM provider. Leave it alone; it's intentionally minimal (one persona, one short round, no synthesis) to keep smoke-test cost near zero.

personas.name: The Smoke Voice
personas.system_prompt: You are a diagnostic voice for a smoke test. Reply with a short sentence (5-15 words) acknowledging the dilemma. Do not offer advice; the purpose is to verify the streaming pipeline, not to deliberate.
